user.title: Add financial assets
user.description: Enter the ticker symbols to track (e.g. TSLA, AAPL, BTC-USD, EURUSD=X, VWCE.DE). Separate multiple symbols with commas or newlines.

data_description.symbols: Comma or newline-separated list of ticker symbols

error.no_symbols: Please enter at least one symbol.
error.invalid_symbols: The following symbols were not found: {invalid_list}
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to data provider. Please try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: TradePulse is already configured. Use the Options menu to manage symbols.

symbols.title: Manage symbols
symbols.description: Add or remove tracked ticker symbols.

data_description.add_symbols: Comma-separated list of new symbols to add
data_description.remove_symbols: Select symbols to remove from tracking

api_keys.title: API keys
api_keys.description: The Finnhub API key is optional. Without it, EU/UK insider (PDMR) data is unavailable. Get a free key at finnhub.io.

error.no_symbols: Please enter at least one symbol.
error.invalid_symbols: The following symbols were not found: {invalid_list}
error.invalid_finnhub_key: Invalid Finnhub API key. The key was not saved.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to data provider. Please try again.
